## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Sunbit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, traffic analysis, and future directions.](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Organic traffic and key metrics (sessions, users, shop directory views) increased in early September](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Shop directory views primarily driven by Sunbit-focused and financing articles, not top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Team to experiment with finance-focused articles, balancing with existing TOFU strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Potential for merchant-generated content and ghostwriting to boost engagement and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)

## Topics

### Traffic Analysis and Content Performance

  - [Early September metrics show positive trends:](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Sessions: 482 → 530](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [Active users: 450 → 489](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [New users: 404 → 422](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
      - [Shop directory views: 49 → 76](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Top traffic drivers: Car and dental cost/tips articles (TOFU)](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Shop directory views mainly from Sunbit-focused, bottom-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Proposal to include more finance-focused articles alongside TOFU content](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Challenges: Legal approval for finance articles may cause delays](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Solution: Flag finance articles in Airtable for separate legal review](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Blog updates: Separating consumer vs. merchant articles, adding "find somebody near you" side panel](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Merchant Engagement with Shop Directory

  - [High merchant interest in directory listings (photos, hours, visibility)](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Potential for UGC-style content loop, similar to Zapier's integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Exploring ghostwriting opportunities for merchant-associated content](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

### SEO and Review Strategies

  - [G2 Crowd investment for reviews, noting their increasing SEO impact](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=696.0)
  - [Emphasis on reviews, recency, and social proof for search engines](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Automated publication testing ongoing; Nikola currently offline](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [Blog UI changes planned, leveraging WordPress categories without URL changes](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Experiment with finance-focused articles, balancing with existing TOFU strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
  - [Jason to send content direction and ideas for finance topics](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Implement flagging system in Airtable for finance articles requiring legal review](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Continue automated publication testing](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Explore potential for merchant-generated or ghostwritten content](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=603.0)
  - [Monitor impact of planned blog UI changes on user engagement and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/zAAYkUHPuUxisuFb8yACoN4XUMtjAjwL?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
